fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the associated Office contact.

fields.name: Associated Table
fields.tooltip: Specifies the table that is associated with the contact, such as Customer, Vendor, Bank Account, or Company.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Contact Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the Office contact.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the contact, such as company or contact person.

fields.name: Company
fields.tooltip: Specifies the company of the contact.
